name: ALDEHYDE 44
description: A luminous and intoxicating fragrance that balances floral rose with cool aldehydes. Timeless and sophisticated, evoking old-world glamour.

name: BAIE ROSE 26
description: A spicy floral with bright pink pepper and soft rose at its heart. Sensual and modern, with a peppery edge that keeps it fresh.

name: BENJOIN 19
description: Warm and resinous with creamy benzoin and rich leather notes. A comforting, almost caramel-like fragrance with depth and substance.

name: BIGARADE 18
description: A vibrant citrus celebration of bitter orange and bergamot with woody cedar undertones. Fresh, zesty, and Mediterranean in spirit.

name: CEDRAT 37
description: Airy and geometric with crisp cedrat and creamy iris. A minimalist citrus that feels clean, abstract, and distinctly modern.

name: CITRON 28
description: Bright and uplifting with zesty citron and delicate orange blossom. A cheerful, fruity fragrance that evokes citrus groves in bloom.

name: CORIANDRE 39
description: Spicy and aromatic with warm coriander and cardamom creating an inviting gourmand feel. Herbaceous and slightly sweet, with woody base.

name: CUIR 28
description: Rich and animalic with soft leather and precious oud. A luxurious, smoky fragrance that feels both ancient and contemporary.

name: GAIAC 10
description: A smoky, woody meditation with earthy gaiac wood and clean vetiver. Meditative and grounding, with a subtle musky drydown.

name: LIMETTE 37
description: Bright and slightly herbal with tart lime and woody cedar. A playful, modern citrus with a sophisticated dry finish.

name: MOUSSE DE CHENE 30
description: Earthy and nostalgic with soft oakmoss and natural woods. A timeless mossy fragrance that feels like a forest floor after rain.

name: MUSC 25
description: Soft and sensual with creamy musk and warm woody notes. A second-skin fragrance that feels like a gentle embrace.

name: MYRRHE 55
description: Resinous and exotic with precious myrrh and warm benzoin. An incense-like fragrance with spiritual depth and ancient allure.

name: OSMANTHUS 19
description: Floral and fruity with delicate osmanthus flower and warm apricot. A delicate, slightly sweet fragrance with woody warmth.

name: POIVRE 23
description: Spicy and peppery with sharp black pepper and warm clove spice. A bold, energetic fragrance that feels refined and slightly herbal.

name: TABAC 28
description: Smoky and sophisticated with warm tobacco leaf and dry vetiver. An intoxicating fragrance with a distinctly masculine character.

name: TUBEREUSE 40
description: Creamy and intoxicating with potent tuberose and delicate lily of the valley. A lush, sensual floral that is both beautiful and indolic.

name: VANILLE 44
description: Rich and creamy with Madagascar vanilla and warm benzoin. A comforting yet sophisticated fragrance with subtle leather undertones.
